field_changes.previous: The causal link between the Blackfish departure and the Artstay/Lovs & Co. role is an inference from timing, not a sourced fact — labelled NOT_FOUND for the 'why'.

field_changes.current: Overloaded, and the renaming direction was recorded backwards (the register shows Lovs & Co. s.r.o. was renamed TO Artstay s.r.o. on 13 Feb 2024, not the reverse). Split and primary-sourced 2026-07-18; see CON-03 for the 2021 media-vs-register ownership timing.

observed_at_basis: retrievedAt nejstaršího citovaného zdroje (horní odhad — samotné pozorování mohlo být dřívější)
